name: Marketplace Marketing
description: Public-facing marketing and landing pages for a two-sided marketplace. Showcases featured listings, categories, testimonials, and conversion CTAs.

page_briefs.home: Marketplace landing page with a bold hero section featuring a search bar, tagline, and background imagery. Below, a content card grid showcases featured listings organized by category. A testimonials section displays buyer and seller quotes with avatars. The page closes with a prominent CTA section encouraging sign-up or listing creation.
page_briefs.about: Brand story page with a large hero section featuring the marketplace mission statement, founding story imagery, and team values. Clean typography-focused layout that communicates trust and community.

shells.top-nav-footer: Top navigation with footer layout for public pages

directives: Hero MUST be visually rich, NOT just headline + stats. Compose: eyebrow + headline + subtitle + dual CTA + supporting media (one of: 2-3 listing card previews to the right of the copy, OR a stylized map snippet, OR a 3-card trust-strip showing 'verified hosts' / 'instant book' / 'review-backed'). A marketplace landing page with no listing imagery feels empty.

Featured listings section: 3-card carousel or grid — each card uses the same anatomy as the browse-page cards (image + title + location + rating + price). The marketing context is showcase: prefer cards with high ratings + good photos + variety of categories.

Social proof: dedicated section with 3-4 user testimonial cards + (optionally) trust stats ('4.9 avg', '14k spots', '38 cities'). Avoid presenting trust stats as the ONLY supporting content — they should accent testimonials, not replace them.
Final CTA banner: re-iterates the dual buyer/seller positioning ('Find your next stay' + 'Become a host'). Both CTAs are equal weight on the page.

About page: hero with mission statement + visual (team or map) + 3-4 value cards + leadership grid (avatar + name + role) + final CTA. Do NOT ship an about page with just a wall of text — marketplace trust depends on a face.
